head: 2e2a80a
workingTree: modified; S2-08 Node floor enforcement changes are uncommitted
scoreReconciliation: Three docs from 2026-05-30 reported different scores (post-roadmap = 6.8/6.2, master-audit = 6.5/6.1, 10-10-remediation = 7.6/7.6). Per Q3 of execution-roadmap.md, the post-roadmap-session figure is authoritative — the 7.6 baseline assumed Phase 0 gates green at HEAD while the tree was dirty.

scaffolded: S1-09 — ZWCMP owner awaits Q6 leadership decision

remediationProgress: F1 closed: roadmap rename + README; pnpm test green from clean checkout.
F2 closed (a364439, 6f79a83): replay-guard exempt-path traversal — pathForExemption normalizes + rejects %2e%2e and backslash variants; middleware branch coverage 63.46% → 81.25%.
F3 closed (1b940d7): /audit/bundles tenant scope bound to signed DID, not x-gtcx-tenant-id header; spoof regression test at handler.test.mjs:135,267.
F4 closed (efcc01e): auth-failure events now tag tenantId='platform'; visible to platform-scoped principals via /v1/exceptions; tenant isolation regression test added.
F7 closed (7081223): alerts-add-runbook-url --check now asserts anchor existence; 37 dead anchors backfilled as STUB sections in alerts.md.
F10 closed (3729a29): verify-catalog pinned trust anchor PINNED_PUBLIC_KEY; 8 test cases for every rejection code.
F11-F14 closed (66e9eb0, d8262f0, 22b7f2e, 152d079): regex bypasses in pin-actions-sha, empty-catch-check, runbook-commands-check; missing-label fix in dependabot-triage workflow.
Meta-finding closed (fb26c9f): 5 previously-unwired gates now invoked from validate-all.mjs Static Validators section.

S2-14 closed (570ad49, 2026-05-31): replay-protection package branch coverage now passes at 90.45%; stale empty-catch allowlist entry removed; node tools/scripts/validate-all.mjs passes 23 of 23 gates.

S2-01 closed (570ad49, 2026-05-31): failClosed wired into audit-flush S3 SDK loading and compliance-gateway soft-import/NDJSON parse sites; stale empty-catch allowlist entries removed; audit-flush and compliance-gateway targeted coverage gates pass; node tools/scripts/validate-all.mjs passes 23 of 23 gates.

S2-02 closed (6bfa2ad, 2026-05-31): checkBudget, recordSpend, and getSpend are async and delegate to budget-store.mjs; /v1/query, /v1/budget, /v1/brief, /audit/bundles, and /audit/query await the store-backed budget gates; compliance-gateway coverage gate passes; node tools/scripts/validate-all.mjs passes 23 of 23 gates.

S2-03 closed (694c458, 2026-05-31): auth-failure-throttle now bounds tracked source IPs with maxIps/LRU eviction and exposes recordAndCheckAuthFailure so the auth-failure path atomically decides whether to sign or suppress audit events; compliance-gateway coverage gate passes; node tools/scripts/validate-all.mjs passes 23 of 23 gates.

S2-04 closed (c1dfadd, 2026-05-31): sourceIpFromRequest now trusts X-Forwarded-For only when the socket peer is inside GTCX_TRUSTED_PROXY_CIDRS; spoofed or malformed XFF falls back to the socket IP; IPv4, IPv6, and IPv4-mapped socket addresses have regression coverage; compliance-gateway coverage gate passes; node tools/scripts/validate-all.mjs passes 23 of 23 gates.

S2-05 closed (2e2a80a, 2026-05-31): /v1/exceptions and /v1/audit/evidence-bundle now emit compliance_gateway_requests_total route/status/tenant series plus endpoint-specific exception-count and evidence-record metrics; route integration tests and compliance-gateway coverage gate pass; node tools/scripts/validate-all.mjs passes 23 of 23 gates.

S2-08 closed (working tree, 2026-05-31): every workspace package manifest now requires node >=20.18.0; GitHub setup-node calls and shared action defaults pin exact 20.18.0; node-version-floor-check.mjs is wired into validate-all to prevent drift; node tools/scripts/validate-all.mjs passes 24 of 24 gates.
remainingGaps: External assurance remains pending; this is an internal audit only.

answered.question: failClosed/budget-store: wire or delete?
answered.rationale: failClosed has 4 documented soft-import sites to wire (~1d); budget-store reuses existing K8s Redis (no net-new infra) and fixes a real HPA-scaled QPS multiplication bug (~2d).

answered.question: Pen-test before or after Sprint 1 fixes?
answered.rationale: Sprint 1 already closed; SOW (S2-13) signed in Sprint 2 targets the post-Sprint-1 state. External review against a stationary post-remediation target is more useful than review against a moving design. No +4w delay.

answered.question: Product motion: product-led vs sales-led?
answered.answer: SALES-LED with primitives as parallel tail
answered.rationale: GTM docs are regulator-led, not developer-led. Sprint 3 headline = S3-11 (ZWCMP signature); S1-09 owner profile = senior pilot-facing operator with prior African-central-bank pilot experience; S3-07 publish-primitives continues in parallel without gating Sprint 3.

answered.question: @types/node dependabot pin?
answered.rationale: Implemented same-day in .github/dependabot.yml — ignore rule on @types/node semver-major. Package.json was already ^22.10.0 (tied to Node 20.x runtime). Open PR #62 to close with rationale.
